title: *New* Online Course Announcement - Fresh Takes on Traveler’s Notebooks!
excerpt: I’m so excited to announce my brand new online course - Fresh Takes on Traveler’s Notebooks: A Creative Memory Keeping Course ! Everything you want to know about traveler’s notebooks! This self-paced online course launches September 8, 2020, and contains…
body:
I’m so excited to announce my brand new online course - Fresh Takes on Traveler’s Notebooks: A Creative Memory Keeping Course!

   

Everything you want to know about traveler’s notebooks!

This self-paced online course launches September 8, 2020, and contains three modules packed with multiple lessons, step-by-step video tutorials, sketches and process photos, exclusive printables, a private Facebook community, live Q+A session with me and more!

Pick what’s right for you!

Sign up for the course itself or get it bundled with two traveler’s notebook kit options!

Registration closes August 25, 2020, so make sure you don’t miss out!

Learn More

Add on these mini kits to your bundle!
